exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Stand with feet together and arms at your sides
Jump while spreading your legs shoulder-width apart and raising your arms overhead
Jump back to the starting position with feet together and arms at sides
Maintain a steady rhythm throughout the movement
Land softly on the balls of your feet
tips: Land softly to reduce impact on joints
Breathe steadily - exhale on the jump up
Start slow and gradually increase speed

modifications.easier: Step side to side instead of jumping
modifications.harder: Add a squat at the bottom position

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed out
Keep your chest up and core engaged
Lower your body by bending knees and pushing hips back as if sitting in a chair
Go down until thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as comfortable
Push through your heels to return to starting position
tips: Keep your knees tracking over your toes
Keep your weight on your heels

modifications.easier: Hold onto a chair or wall for support
modifications.harder: Add a pause at the bottom or do jump squats

exercises.name: Standard Push-ups
instructions: Start in a plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels
Lower your chest toward the ground by bending elbows
Go down until chest nearly touches the floor
Push back up to starting position
tips: Don't let hips sag or pike up
Breathe in going down, out going up

modifications.easier: Do knee push-ups or incline push-ups
modifications.harder: Elevate feet or add a clap

exercises.name: Knee Push-ups
instructions: Start on hands and knees with hands slightly wider than shoulders
Keep your body in a straight line from head to knees
Cross your ankles behind you
Lower your chest toward the ground by bending elbows
Push back up to starting position
tips: Maintain straight line from head to knees
Full range of motion is important

modifications.easier: Do wall push-ups or incline push-ups
modifications.harder: Progress to standard push-ups

exercises.name: Plank Hold
instructions: Start in a forearm plank position with elbows under shoulders
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels
Engage your core and squeeze your glutes
Hold this position without letting hips sag or pike up
Breathe steadily throughout the hold
tips: Keep your neck neutral - don't look up
Squeeze glutes to protect lower back

modifications.easier: Do plank on knees or against a wall
modifications.harder: Lift one leg or add shoulder taps

exercises.name: Lunges
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Step forward with one leg, landing heel first
Lower your body until both knees are bent at 90 degrees
Front knee should be directly over ankle
Push through front heel to return to starting position
tips: Don't let front knee go past toes
Back knee should hover just above ground

modifications.easier: Hold onto a wall or chair for balance
modifications.harder: Add a jump or hold weights

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Step forward with one leg into a lunge position
Lower your body until both knees are bent at 90 degrees
Push through front heel and bring back leg forward into next lunge
Continue walking forward, alternating legs
tips: Keep your torso upright throughout the movement
Don't let front knee go past toes
commonMistakes: Taking steps that are too small or too large

modifications.easier: Hold onto a wall or do stationary lunges
modifications.harder: Add weights or increase walking distance

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start in a high plank position with hands under shoulders
Keep your body in a straight line
Drive one knee toward your chest
Quickly switch legs, bringing the other knee forward
Continue alternating legs in a running motion
tips: Keep hips level - don't let them bounce
Land softly on the balls of your feet
commonMistakes: Not bringing knees far enough forward
Going too fast and losing form

modifications.easier: Slow down the pace or elevate hands
modifications.harder: Increase speed or add a twist

exercises.name: Burpees
instructions: Start standing with feet shoulder-width apart
Drop into a squat and place hands on the ground
Jump or step feet back into a plank position
Perform a push-up (optional for beginners)
Jump or step feet back to squat position
Explosively jump up with arms overhead

modifications.easier: Step back instead of jumping, skip the push-up
modifications.harder: Add a tuck jump or do a full push-up

exercises.name: High Knees
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Drive one knee up toward your chest
Quickly switch legs, bringing the other knee up
Pump your arms in running motion
Continue alternating legs at a quick pace
tips: Drive knees up to hip height or higher
Stay on the balls of your feet
commonMistakes: Leaning too far forward or back

modifications.easier: March in place with lower knee lift
modifications.harder: Increase speed or add a hop

exercises.name: Crunches
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on floor
Place hands behind your head or across chest
Engage your core and lift shoulder blades off the ground
Curl up toward your knees, keeping lower back on floor
Lower back down with control
tips: Focus on using abs, not momentum
Keep lower back pressed to floor

modifications.easier: Do partial crunches or hold at top
modifications.harder: Add a twist or hold a weight

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on floor
Place arms at your sides, palms down
Engage your core and squeeze your glutes
Lift your hips up until body forms a straight line from knees to shoulders
Hold at the top, then lower back down with control
tips: Squeeze glutes hard at the top
Don't arch your lower back excessively
commonMistakes: Pushing through toes instead of heels

modifications.easier: Reduce range of motion
modifications.harder: Single-leg bridges or add a pause at top

exercises.name: Jump Squats
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Lower into a squat position
Explosively jump up as high as possible
Land softly and immediately go into next squat
Maintain control throughout the movement
tips: Land softly on balls of feet

modifications.easier: Regular bodyweight squats
modifications.harder: Add tuck jump or 180-degree turn

exercises.name: Calf Raises
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Rise up onto balls of feet
Squeeze calf muscles at the top
Lower back down with control
Repeat for desired reps

modifications.easier: Hold wall for balance
modifications.harder: Single-leg calf raises

exercises.name: Modified Burpees
instructions: Start standing
Squat down and place hands on floor
Step back into plank position
Step feet back to squat
Stand up (no jump)

modifications.easier: Remove plank hold
modifications.harder: Add push-up or jump

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunches
instructions: Lie on back with hands behind head
Lift shoulders off ground
Bring right elbow to left knee
Switch sides in cycling motion
Keep core engaged throughout

modifications.easier: Regular crunches
modifications.harder: Add pause at each side

exercises.name: Butt Kicks
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Jog in place while kicking heels to glutes
Alternate legs quickly
Pump arms in running motion
Maintain upright posture

modifications.easier: Slower pace or march in place
modifications.harder: Increase speed or add hop

exercises.name: Wall Sit
instructions: Stand with back against wall
Slide down until thighs are parallel to floor
Keep knees at 90-degree angle
Hold position for desired time
Keep core engaged throughout
tips: Don't let knees go past toes

modifications.easier: Higher position or shorter hold
modifications.harder: Single leg or longer hold

exercises.name: Full Burpees
instructions: Start standing
Drop into squat, hands on floor
Jump feet back to plank
Do a push-up
Jump feet back to squat
Explosively jump up with arms overhead

modifications.easier: Modified burpees or step instead of jump
modifications.harder: Add tuck jump or clap

exercises.name: Incline Push-ups
instructions: Place hands on elevated surface
Walk feet back to plank position
Lower chest toward surface
Push back up to starting position
Keep body in straight line

modifications.easier: Higher surface like wall
modifications.harder: Lower surface or standard push-ups

exercises.name: Tricep Dips
instructions: Sit on edge of chair or bench
Place hands beside hips
Slide forward off edge
Lower body by bending elbows
Push back up to starting position

modifications.easier: Bend knees or use legs for assist
modifications.harder: Straight legs or elevate feet

exercises.name: Wall Push-ups
instructions: Stand arm's length from wall
Place palms flat against wall
Lean forward and push back
Keep body straight
Control the movement

modifications.easier: Stand closer to wall
modifications.harder: Stand further back or incline push-ups

exercises.name: Superman Holds
instructions: Lie face down on the floor with arms extended overhead
Keep your head in neutral position looking down
Simultaneously lift your chest, arms, and legs off the ground
Hold this position while squeezing your glutes and lower back
Lower back down with control
tips: Don't lift too high - focus on muscle engagement
Keep neck neutral, don't crane your head up
Squeeze glutes to protect lower back
Start with shorter holds and build up
commonMistakes: Lifting too high and straining neck

modifications.easier: Lift only chest or only legs
modifications.harder: Hold for longer duration or add pulses

exercises.name: Reverse Snow Angels
instructions: Lie face down with arms at your sides
Lift your chest slightly off the ground
Sweep your arms out to the sides and overhead
Bring arms back to starting position
Keep chest lifted throughout the movement
tips: Focus on squeezing shoulder blades together

modifications.easier: Keep chest on ground, move only arms
modifications.harder: Hold at top position or add light weights

exercises.name: Plank Rows
instructions: Start in a high plank position
Lift one arm off the ground and pull elbow back
Squeeze shoulder blade and engage core
Return arm to plank position
Alternate arms while maintaining plank

modifications.easier: Do from knees or against wall
modifications.harder: Add weights or hold longer

exercises.name: Arm Circles
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Extend arms out to sides at shoulder height
Make small circles with your arms
Gradually increase circle size
Reverse direction after desired reps
tips: Keep arms straight and parallel to floor
commonMistakes: Making circles too big too fast

modifications.easier: Smaller circles or shorter duration
modifications.harder: Larger circles or add light weights

exercises.name: Prone Y Raises
instructions: Lie face down with arms extended in Y position
Lift your chest and arms off the ground
Squeeze shoulder blades together
Hold briefly at the top
Lower back down with control
commonMistakes: Lifting too high and straining neck

modifications.easier: Lift only arms, keep chest down
modifications.harder: Hold longer or add light weights

exercises.name: Decline Push-ups
instructions: Place feet on elevated surface (couch, chair, or step)
Get into push-up position with hands on floor
Keep body in straight line from head to heels
Lower chest toward floor by bending elbows
Push back up to starting position
tips: Don't let hips sag or pike up

modifications.easier: Lower elevation or standard push-ups
modifications.harder: Higher elevation or single-arm variations

exercises.name: Diamond Push-ups
instructions: Start in push-up position
Place hands close together forming diamond shape with thumbs and index fingers
Keep body in straight line
Lower chest toward hands
Push back up to starting position

modifications.easier: Knee diamond push-ups or close-grip push-ups
modifications.harder: Feet elevated or single-arm

exercises.name: Single Leg Calf Raises
instructions: Stand on one foot with other foot lifted behind you
Hold wall or chair for balance if needed
Rise up onto ball of standing foot
Squeeze calf muscle at the top
Lower back down with control

modifications.easier: Hold wall for balance or both legs
modifications.harder: No support or add weight

exercises.name: Plyometric Push-ups
instructions: Start in push-up position
Lower chest toward floor
Explosively push up so hands leave ground
Land softly and immediately go into next rep
Maintain control throughout
commonMistakes: Not going low enough on descent

modifications.easier: Incline plyometric push-ups or clap push-ups
modifications.harder: Single-arm or higher jumps

exercises.name: Box Jumps
instructions: Stand facing a sturdy box or platform
Bend knees and swing arms back
Jump explosively onto the box
Land softly with both feet on box
Step down carefully or jump down
tips: Land softly on balls of feet
commonMistakes: Box too high for skill level

modifications.easier: Lower box or step-ups
modifications.harder: Higher box or single-leg jumps

exercises.name: Side Planks
instructions: Lie on your side with elbow directly under shoulder
Stack your feet and legs on top of each other
Lift your hips off the ground creating straight line
Hold this position while engaging core
Keep your head in neutral position
tips: Don't let hips sag or pike

modifications.easier: Drop to knees or lean against wall
modifications.harder: Lift top leg or add arm movements

exercises.name: Russian Twists
instructions: Sit with knees bent and feet slightly off ground
Lean back to create V-shape with torso and thighs
Clasp hands together in front of chest
Rotate torso side to side touching ground
Keep core engaged throughout movement
tips: Keep chest up and shoulders back
Keep feet off ground if possible

modifications.easier: Keep feet on ground or hold wall
modifications.harder: Hold weight or medicine ball

exercises.name: Dead Bugs
instructions: Lie on back with arms extended toward ceiling
Lift knees to 90-degree angle
Slowly lower opposite arm and leg toward floor
Return to starting position with control
Alternate sides while keeping core engaged
tips: Keep lower back pressed to floor
Don't let limbs touch the ground

modifications.easier: Move only arms or only legs
modifications.harder: Hold longer or add resistance

exercises.name: Bird Dogs
instructions: Start on hands and knees in tabletop position
Extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously
Hold for a moment while maintaining balance
Return to starting position with control
Alternate sides keeping core engaged

modifications.easier: Lift only arm or only leg
modifications.harder: Hold longer or add resistance bands

exercises.name: Hollow Body Holds
instructions: Lie on back with arms extended overhead
Press lower back into floor
Lift shoulders and legs off ground
Create hollow shape with your body
Hold position while breathing steadily
tips: Keep lower back pressed to floor

modifications.easier: Bend knees or keep arms at sides
modifications.harder: Rock back and forth or hold longer
